skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Perform a structured code review with severity-tagged feedback. Use when the user asks for a code review, PR feedback, or wants to evaluate a diff before merge.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: conventional-commits
skills.description: Generate Conventional Commits messages from staged changes. Use when the user asks to write a commit message, follow Conventional Commits, or summarize staged changes.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: debugging
skills.description: Systematically debug a problem: reproduce, isolate, fix, verify, prevent regression. Use when the user reports a bug, an unexpected error, or asks to investigate failing tests.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: pr-description
skills.description: Write a clear, scannable pull request description from a diff or branch. Use when the user asks to draft a PR description, summarize a branch, or prepare a change for review.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: refactoring
skills.description: Refactor code safely: characterization tests first, small reversible steps, verify after each step. Use when the user asks to refactor, restructure, clean up, or simplify existing code.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: test-writing
skills.description: Decide what to test, structure tests with arrange/act/assert, and avoid common pitfalls. Use when the user asks to write, add, or improve tests for existing code.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: api-design
skills.description: Design consistent HTTP/REST endpoints: resource naming, status codes, pagination, error formats, versioning. Use when the user asks to design, review, or extend an HTTP API.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: security-audit
skills.description: Perform an OWASP-flavored security review focused on input handling, authentication, secrets, and dependencies. Use when the user asks for a security audit, threat review, or vulnerability check.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: accessibility-review
skills.description: Perform a WCAG-flavored accessibility review of UI code or markup. Use when the user asks for an a11y review, accessibility audit, WCAG check, or wants to make a component/page usable for assistive tech.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: performance-budget
skills.description: Define and enforce performance budgets for web apps - bundle size, Core Web Vitals, render time, API latency. Use when the user asks to set perf budgets, review performance, investigate slowness, or set up performance gates in CI.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: changelog
skills.description: Maintain a CHANGELOG.md following the Keep a Changelog format with semver. Use when the user asks to update the changelog, add release notes, prepare a release, or generate changelog entries from commits or merged PRs.
skills.author: elyra-skills

skills.name: dependency-update
skills.description: Safely update project dependencies - assess risk, batch by risk level, verify with tests, and produce a clean changelog. Use when the user asks to update dependencies, bump packages, audit outdated deps, or handle a security advisory.
skills.author: elyra-skills
